scope_note: QA 3-Adic Filtration cert [301]. Primary sources: Hardy, G.H. and Wright, E.M. (2008) An Introduction to the Theory of Numbers, Oxford, ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5, Ch.IV (p-adic valuation) and Ch.VII (congruences, Hensel's lemma); Wall, D.D. (1960) Fibonacci Primitive Roots, Amer. Math. Monthly 67(6):525-532 DOI 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541 (Pisano period pi(3)=8, pi(9)=24). NOTE: this cert works in Z/9Z = {0,...,8} (not A1 {1,...,9}) for arithmetic cleanness; T_0(b,e)=(e,(b+e) mod 9). CLAIM (narrow, falsifiable): Let mu3(b,e)=(3b mod 9, 3e mod 9) be multiplication-by-3 in Z/9Z. (C1) mu3 maps all 72 Cosmos states (v3(gcd)=0) to Satellite states (v3(gcd)=1); exhaustive on all 81 states in Z/9Z^2. (C2) mu3 maps all 8 Satellite states (v3(gcd)=1) to (0,0) (Singularity); verified exhaustively. (C3) mu3 is exactly 9-to-1 on Cosmos->Satellite: each of the 8 Satellite states has exactly 9 Cosmos preimages; verified by enumeration. (C4) Intertwining: T_0 o mu3 = mu3 o T_0 on all 81 states of Z/9Z^2 (because T_0 is linear: T_0(3v) = 3*T_0(v) mod 9); verified exhaustively. (C5) GF(3) layer: x^2-x-1 irreducible over Z/3Z (no roots in {0,1,2}); M mod 3 has order 8 in GL(2,Z/3Z) (M^8=I mod 3, no smaller divisor gives I); the 72 Cosmos states reduce mod 3 onto (Z/3Z)^2 minus {(0,0)} exactly 9-to-1. Mechanism: Theorem NT maintained; all computations on integer pairs in Z/9Z. Builds on cert [298] (v3(gcd) T-invariant, orbit strata 1+8+72), cert [300] (SL(2,Z) equivariance). The 3-adic filtration Cosmos ->^{x3} Satellite ->^{x3} Singularity is the Hensel tower from (Z/3Z)^2 to (Z/9Z)^2, with periods 8/8/1 at GF(3) level lifting to 24/8/1 at Z/9Z level via pi(9)=3*pi(3). Lineage: derived 2026-06-02.
